description: Build AI Roast My Website - a viral micro-SaaS that lets users paste a URL and get a brutally honest, humorous roast of their website's design, copy, and UX. Generates shareable roast cards with scores.
steps: Create directory viral-ai-saas/ai-roast-my-website/ with standard structure: server.js, package.json, db/, routes/, views/, public/css/, public/js/, tests/, README.md, .gitignore
Create package.json with dependencies: express, ejs, better-sqlite3, bcrypt, express-session. Scripts: start (node server.js), test (node --test tests/app.test.js)

Create db/schema.sql with tables: users (id, email, password_hash, created_at), roasts (id, user_id nullable, url, design_score, copy_score, ux_score, overall_score, roast_text, share_id unique, created_at)
Create db/database.js following the pattern from ai-content-generator (better-sqlite3, DB_PATH env, WAL mode, schema init)
Create routes/auth.js with login/register/logout routes following the existing pattern

Create routes/roast.js with: POST /roast/generate (accepts URL, generates mock AI roast with scores 1-10 for design/copy/UX, funny critique text, saves to DB with unique share_id), GET /roast/:shareId (public shareable roast card page)

The mock AI roast generator should produce varied, humorous critiques based on URL characteristics (domain name, TLD, etc). Include categories: Design Disaster, Copy Catastrophe, UX Nightmare, Overall Verdict. Each with a witty one-liner and detailed roast paragraph.
Create views/index.ejs - stunning landing page with gradient hero, URL input form, example roast cards, social proof. Dark theme with neon accents for edgy viral feel.
Create views/result.ejs - roast results page showing scores as animated gauges/meters, roast text with sections, share buttons (Twitter, LinkedIn, copy link), download as image button
Create views/share.ejs - public shareable page showing the roast card (works without auth), with CTA to roast your own website
Create views/login.ejs and views/register.ejs following auth pattern
Create views/dashboard.ejs showing user's roast history
Create public/css/style.css with dark theme, neon gradient accents, animated score meters, card styling optimized for screenshots
Create public/js/app.js with form submission handling, score animations, share functionality (copy to clipboard, Twitter intent URL), and client-side image generation for download
Create server.js following the pattern: EJS views, middleware, session, routes, conditional listen

Create tests/app.test.js with comprehensive tests: server startup, landing page, auth flow (register, login, reject duplicates), roast generation (valid URL, missing URL, scores in valid range), share page access, roast history
Create README.md with app description, features, setup instructions, and tech stack
acceptance_criteria: Landing page renders with URL input form
Submitting a URL returns a roast with design/copy/UX scores (1-10)
Each roast gets a unique shareable link
Share page is accessible without authentication
findings: All 22 tests pass. App created at viral-ai-saas/ai-roast-my-website/ with full auth, roast generation, shareable roast cards, and dashboard. Mock AI generates varied roasts based on URL characteristics. No external API calls needed.
